item.eternis.frostbite.lore: Forged in the heart of an ancient blizzard. Each swing carries the stillness of frozen winds.
item.eternis.glacier_spear.lore: A spear carved from living ice. The land freezes wherever its path is drawn.
item.eternis.winters_dominion.lore: The hammer of the northern storms. It grows colder with every victory.
item.eternis.heartwood_reaver.lore: A relic carved from living heartwood. The forest itself reaches out to defend its bearer.
item.eternis.verdant_edge.lore: A blade born of fertile soil. Life itself rises to aid its wielder.
item.eternis.windpiercer.lore: Forged for the open plains, where nothing outruns the wind.
item.eternis.sylvan_oath.lore: A pact between the wild and the hunter. The forest never forgets its allies.
item.eternis.sunfang.lore: A blade kissed by the burning sun. Its strikes carry the fury of daylight.
item.eternis.pride_talons.lore: Daggers of the apex predator. Each victory sharpens the hunt.
item.eternis.storm_javelin.lore: A weapon struck by lightning itself. The storm answers its call.
item.eternis.dune_scimitar.lore: A blade shaped by shifting sands. Its strike blinds like the desert storm.
item.eternis.pharaohs_judgement.lore: A relic of forgotten kings. Even the dead remember its authority.
item.eternis.canyon_breaker.lore: Forged from the iron veins of the badlands. Even the earth yields to its power.
item.eternis.mycelium_sovereign.lore: A scepter grown from the hidden fungal network beneath the island.
item.eternis.venom_reaver.lore: Forged from the fangs of jungle predators, every kill sharpens its poison.
item.eternis.canopy_breaker.lore: A spear grown from ancient jungle wood. The forest itself answers its call.
item.eternis.infernal_canopy.lore: Born where jungle roots meet molten earth. Flame and vine rise together.
item.eternis.hellgate_tyrant.lore: A blade forged in the fires of the Nether. Its master may command the gates of hell.
item.eternis.void_sovereign.lore: Forged from fragments of the Void itself. The End bends to its wielder.
